item.title: Is It OK to ‘Teach a Lesson’ to Strangers?
item.description: A ruling on a mother’s curious locker-room practice.

item.title: The Wellness Guru Jay Shetty Has Raised Some Doubts. Including His Own.
item.description: The self-help influencer on his values, his journey and criticism of his work.

item.title: We’re the Guardians of a Difficult Teenager. What Do We Owe Them?
item.description: I’ve found myself carrying negative feelings that I don’t want but can’t quite shake.

item.title: What You Miss When You’re Always Wearing Headphones
item.description: Loud racket in public is obnoxious, but so is our way of dealing with it.

item.title: International Oscar Favorites Are Offering a Complicated New View of America
item.description: The Oscars has become friendlier to non-English language movies. And the movies seem aware of their American audiences.

item.title: Do I Have to Watch a Show I Dislike With My Son?
item.description: A ruling on a dispute over quality time.

item.title: Maggie Gyllenhaal on Envy, Rage and Reaching Out to Her Brother
item.description: With a big budget and a lot to say, the filmmaker is unleashing her inner monster with “The Bride!”

item.title: How Selling Out Made Me a Better Artist
item.description: I thought my art had to be protected from the real world, but that ended up being unrealistic.

item.title: In Today’s Conspiracy Theories, the Lack of Evidence Is the Evidence
item.description: The conspiracy theories of our time seem fixated on an absence of clues.

item.title: I Saw a Child Who Seemed Neglected. Should I Have Done Something?
item.description: I worry that I’m piling assumptions onto a family I know nothing about, a family that might be doing its best.

item.title: My Aging Mother Won’t Stop Driving. Should I Take Away Her Keys?
item.description: The D.M.V. has suspended her license and she’s irate, blaming us.

item.title: It’s an Obscure Psychedelic Used to Treat Trauma. Could It Help Me?
item.description: Veterans and others who have suffered trauma and injuries are flocking to clinics around the world to take ibogaine. My own reason was deeply personal.

item.title: In a World Order Defined by Trump, the Key to Europe’s Defense Is Germany
item.description: In the wake of the U.S. bombing of Iran and its dismissal of European allies, an anxious continent’s best chance at security runs through its largest economy.

item.title: A Psychoanalyst Lets Us Eavesdrop
item.description: Stephen Grosz’s books show a new generation the inner workings of psychoanalysis.
